html:
A Pomegranate is a rare Fruit that can be Farmed from Farm Plots by planting Seeds for a 5% chance of growing, or using Pomegranate Seeds (Windblown Seeds). It can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes. Feeding a Pomegranate to a Bird in a Birdcage will produce 1–2 Pomegranate Seeds with a 50% chance to also drop a regular seed.

Pomegranate can be used as a Crock Pot ingredient with 1 Fruit value.

Sliced Pomegranate

Sliced Pomegranate is a Fruit Food item made by Cooking a Pomegranate on a Campfire, Fire Pit or Star. It restores 20 and slightly more hunger than its raw counterpart, but its spoilage time is halved. It can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes. It can be used as an alternative to healing items, such as Healing Salves and Honey Poultices.

Usage

Tips

  • It's not efficient to eat a Pomegranate as Wortox to deal with hunger, as the bonus given upon consumption is almost non-existent. The player can get more advantages out of it if used in a Crock Pot or if consumed as a healing alternative.

Gallery

  • Original HD Pomegranate icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Original HD Cooked Pomegranate icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

Miscellaneous
"pomegranate"
“It looks like the inside of an alien's brain.”
–Wilson, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Is it supposed to have this many parts?”
–Willow, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Look like smartypants brain.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Pomegranate.
“So many juicy red bits to chomp and squish!”
–Wendy, when examining a Pomegranate.
“IT IS DIFFICULT TO PEEL”
–WX-78, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Punica granatum. Watery, sweet and a bit sour.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Pomegranate.
“That's too fancy for me.”
–Woodie, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Usually I'd get someone to seed this for me.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Pomegranate.
“A rare fruit, but I'd rather not eat it raw.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Fruity flesh.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Pomegranate.
“I didn't expect this to grow.”
–Webber, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Seedy.”
–Walani, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Wonderful!”
–Warly, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Me mates tell me this be good fer me heart.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Pomegranate.
“'TIS FRUIT O' MANY SEEDS”
–Wilba, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Seedy fruits”
–Wormwood, when examining a Pomegranate.
“A bunch of seeds in the guise of a fruit.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Eat that and you're stuck here forever!”
–Winona, when examining a Pomegranate.
“You need only eat one seed. Hyuyu!”
–Wortox, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Ohhh, you not supposed to just bite into it?”
–Wurt, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Fruit guts!”
–Walter, when examining a Pomegranate.
“Who wants to spend time picking out every individual seed?”
–Wanda, when examining a Pomegranate.
A Pomegranate is a rare Fruit that can be Farmed from Farm Plots by planting Seeds for a 5% chance of growing, or using Pomegranate Seeds (Windblown Seeds). It can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes. Feeding a Pomegranate to a Bird in a Birdcage will produce 1–2 Pomegranate Seeds with a 50% chance to also drop a regular seed.
Pomegranate can be used as a Crock Pot ingredient with 1 Fruit value.
Sliced Pomegranate[edit | edit source]
Sliced Pomegranate
Food Info

3 Days

Miscellaneous
"pomegranate_cooked"
“Haute Cuisine!”
–Wilson, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Fire always makes things better.”
–Willow, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Ha ha ha! I cook brain! Not so smart now.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Warm, but no less messy.”
–Wendy, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“DELECTABLE”
–WX-78, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Punica granatum is so nice when it's warmed up.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“This would go good on flapjacks.”
–Woodie, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“A little more refined, at least.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Looks delicious. I do hope I can consume this.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Seared fruit flesh.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“It's good for us!”
–Webber, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Hot'n'juicy.”
–Walani, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Could use tahini and mint...”
–Warly, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Seedy.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“FWOOSH'D FRUIT O' MANY SEEDS”
–Wilba, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Good belly stuff”
–Wormwood, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“You can cook anything. Whether it's good or not is another story.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“It does look pretty tempting.”
–Winona, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“The underworld can wait.”
–Wortox, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“Hmm... okay...”
–Wurt, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“I thought it would taste better.”
–Walter, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
“It seemed like a better idea in my head.”
–Wanda, when examining a Sliced Pomegranate.
Sliced Pomegranate is a Fruit Food item made by Cooking a Pomegranate on a Campfire, Fire Pit or Star. It restores 20 and slightly more hunger than its raw counterpart, but its spoilage time is halved. It can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes. It can be used as an alternative to healing items, such as Healing Salves and Honey Poultices.

It's not efficient to eat a Pomegranate as Wortox to deal with hunger, as the bonus given upon consumption is almost non-existent. The player can get more advantages out of it if used in a Crock Pot or if consumed as a healing alternative.

A '''Pomegranate''' is a rare [[Fruit]] that can be [[Farming|Farmed]] from [[Farm Plot]]s by planting [[Seeds]] for a 5% chance of growing, or using [[Pomegranate Seeds]] (Windblown Seeds).  It can be used as an ingredient in several [[Crock Pot]] recipes. Feeding a Pomegranate to a [[Birds|Bird]] in a [[Birdcage]] will produce 1–2 [[Pomegranate Seeds]] with a 50% chance to also drop a regular seed.

Pomegranate can be used as a [[Crock Pot]] ingredient with 1 [[Fruit]] value.

'''Sliced Pomegranate''' is a [[Fruit]] [[Food]] item made by [[Cooking]] a Pomegranate on a [[Campfire]], [[Fire Pit]] or [[Star Caller's Staff|Star]]. It restores 20 {{hp}} and slightly more [[hunger]] than its raw counterpart, but its spoilage time is halved. It can also be used as an ingredient in several [[Crock Pot]] recipes. It can be used as an alternative to healing items, such as [[Healing Salve]]s and [[Honey Poultice]]s.
{{clear}}
=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe|item=Pomegranate|result=Sliced Pomegranate|fire=yes}}
{{Recipe|item=Pomegranate|result=Pomegranate Seeds|bird=yes}}
{{Recipe|item=Pomegranates|result=Manure|manure = yes}}

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==

* It's not efficient to eat a Pomegranate as [[Wortox]] to deal with hunger, as the bonus given upon consumption is almost non-existent. The player can get more advantages out of it if used in a [[Crock Pot]] or if consumed as a healing alternative.
